# RemShield — AI Engineering Studio
# https://remshield.solutions

> RemShield is an AI engineering studio that designs and builds AI-powered software, automation systems, and custom AI solutions for growing businesses. Founded in 2025 by David Adesina.

## What We Do
RemShield provides three core services:
- AI Systems: Intelligent assistants, voice agents, document analysis, and custom AI copilots
- Automation Infrastructure: Workflow automation, CRM automation, and operations pipelines
- Custom Software: SaaS platforms, internal tools, and AI-powered applications
- SaaS Product: Answer Architect (answerarchitect.ai) — AI search visibility and GEO optimization platform

## Public Pages
- /: Homepage — AI engineering studio overview, services, and consultation booking
- /about: About RemShield — founder story, team, and company background
- /blog: AI insights, automation guides, and thought leadership
- /contact: Project enquiries and strategy call booking
- /privacy: Privacy policy
- /terms: Terms of service
